subject: Re: Can't run, is this a known thing?
body:
It's a GTX 960, so Maxwell.

A bunch of runtimes got installed when I trued to set up the visual studio 
environment, which is probably why it changed from that first error to 
exception in ctor() error.

Whoop, updated the nvidia driver and that fixed it.

Slightly nicer error message might be nice though :)
